pages.title: Decorator
pages.text: Class-gate only. The Wallpapers mod plus six themed Mine Cells flags. Eighty-nine items — the largest cosmetic catalogue.

pages.title: Wallpaper rolls
pages.text: Standard 16-color set, dye-matched: white, orange, magenta, light blue, yellow, lime, pink, gray, light gray, cyan, purple, blue, brown, green, red, black.$(br2)Plus 30+ themed rolls (acorn, action, amber, ash, banana, beige, and on through the alphabet). The full list lives in JEI.

pages.title: Skirting boards
pages.text: Stone-tier trim:$(br)Andesite, Blackstone, Calcite, Dark Prismarine, Deepslate, Diorite, Dripstone, Gold, Granite, Prismarine, Quartz, Stone, Tuff.

pages.title: Themed flags (6)
pages.text: $(bold)King's Crest$(/) — Chancellor's banner.$(br2)$(bold)Torn King's Crest, Black Bridge, Insufferable Crypt, Promenade of the Condemned, Ramparts.$(/)$(br2)Generic colored ribbon flags and the flag pole stay normally craftable, not gated.$(br2)Matching trader: the Flag Maker (flags) and the Decorator (wallpapers and skirting).
